title: Huawei makes 1.4nm chip??
summary: Caleb discusses Huawei's announcement of Tau Scaling Law as a competitive response in the hardware and semiconductor race between China and the USA. The analysis emphasizes the roles of EUV and DUV lithography, packaging, and logic folding in advancing chip manufacturing capabilities.
